paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently at 6.32, with a change of -3.95% compared to the prior close and -20.9% over a window of 21 sessions. The company has seen 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news includes an article about Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built by Pantex, and an announcement about the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

The recent news articles are from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and PR Newswire, both dated 2026-07-23. These articles suggest that the company is involved in significant projects and is making announcements about its shares. There are no new social posts in the last 24 hours.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on 2026-07-23 about the appointment of new officers, and an 8-K filing on 2026-07-15 about the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there was a Form 4 filing, indicating some level of insider activity.
